title: salvia dorrii var. carnosa
intro: Salvia dorrii var. carnosa, also known as Mountain Sage or Red Sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salvia dorrii var. carnosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
